item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I just want to be able to keep working...
item.description:
One weeks worth cost of this medication would cover all my bills combined, with the exception of my health insurance premium.
I have a good job. A job that until recently was a very well paying job. Cost of living increases have pretty much shot that through the head though.
I could do it. It would wipe out my entire bank account, and I'd not have money to pay my property taxes though. I need my house, it's kind of a necessity.
The cost of all healthcare is just too goddamned high. And the assistance programs can't assist for very long because money is finite, and there are so many people applying for the assistance programs.
item.dc:creator: DirigoTuSequere

item.title: Update! She lost and everything I gathered to help sink her campaign wasn’t needed.
item.description: Prior post: https://imgur.com/gallery/RuFlOgP She didn’t make it to the next round of Who Wants To Be A Representative, so her campaign is OVER. She burned bridges with soooo many family and friends in pursuit of her desire to be the GQP’s lightning rod. She had zero understanding of politics or the process of creating law, and her only platform was that America is better with a dictatorship.
item.dc:creator: f1photog

item.title: Escape Existentialism Fri-Dump
item.description:
Team no kids yay
I forget the name of the series, but the protagonist was a middle aged swordsman, that was literally average, or even considered unattractive. An uphill struggle I continuously relate to.
Former brewer here, refuse to drink IPAs now.
Replaying RDR2 has me just like this
item.dc:creator: CausticLemonEnema
